allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem node_modules -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "zip|docx|pdf|pptx" } | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\NITIN~1.VAR\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\aadlc-pdds\\6a0ea879bbfc6eb7333fdd6a-1779345529927-PDD_Graphic Tracker Autonumbering_v1.2_latest.docx"; $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); "Length=$\($b.Length\) bytes"; "First 30 bytes \(hex\): $\(\($b[0..29] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '\)"; "First 30 bytes \(ASCII\): $\(-join \($b[0..29] | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -ge 32 -and $_ -le 126\) { [char]$_ } else { '.' } }\)\)")

PowerShell($srv = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "C:\\Users\\nitin.varshneya\\Downloads\\Agent Development\\Agent Development"; node server/index.js 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $h = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5; "HEALTH: $\($h.StatusCode\) $\($h.Content\)" } catch { "HEALTH FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "SRVJOB_ID=$\($srv.Id\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $h = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "HEALTH OK: $\($h.Content\)" } catch { "HEALTH FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(node -e "const r = require\('./server/routes/projects'\); console.log\('projects.js routes loaded ok. stack length:', r.stack.length\);")

PowerShell($j = Get-Content tmp-pdd-analysis\\sdd.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "overview length: $\($j.overview.Length\)"; Write-Output "screens:"; foreach \($s in $j.screens\) { Write-Output \("  - {0} \({1}\)" -f $s.name, $s.id\); Write-Output \("    referencedPddImages: {0}" -f \($s.referencedPddImages -join ','\)\); Write-Output \("    wireframe length: {0}" -f $s.wireframe.Length\) }; Write-Output "`nuserFlows:"; foreach \($f in $j.userFlows\) { Write-Output \("  - $\($f.name\) \(asciiSeq len: $\($f.asciiSequence.Length\)\)"\) }; Write-Output "`npddVisualReferences:"; foreach \($r in $j.pddVisualReferences\) { Write-Output \("  - Figure {0}: {1}" -f $r.imageIndex, $r.whatItShows\) })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content tmp-pdd-analysis\\sdd.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "=== Overview ==="; Write-Output $j.overview; Write-Output "`n=== Sample wireframe \(New Graphic Request\) ==="; \($j.screens | Where-Object { $_.id -eq 'new-item' }\).wireframe; Write-Output "`n=== Sample userFlow asciiSequence ==="; $j.userFlows[0].asciiSequence | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell($f = Get-Item tmp-pdd-analysis\\SDD_Graphic_Autonumber.docx; Write-Output \("Size: {0} bytes" -f $f.Length\); Write-Output \("LastWriteTime: {0}" -f $f.LastWriteTime\); $d = Get-Item "C:\\Users\\nitin.varshneya\\Downloads\\SDD_Graphic_Autonumber.docx"; Write-Output \("Downloads size: {0} bytes" -f $d.Length\))

PowerShell($t = Get-Content tmp-pdd-analysis\\tdd.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $task = $t.tasks | Where-Object { $_.id -eq 6 }; Write-Output "=== Task #6 ==="; "Title: $\($task.title\)"; "Module: $\($task.module\)"; "Description:"; $task.description; ""; "Acceptance criteria:"; $task.acceptanceCriteria | ForEach-Object { "  - $_" }; ""; "Pseudocode:"; $task.pseudocode | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell(node -e "const r = require\('./server/routes/projects'\); const stack = r.stack || []; const list = stack.map\(l => `${Object.keys\(l.route?.methods || {}\).join\(','\).toUpperCase\(\)} ${l.route?.path}`\).filter\(s => s.trim\(\)\); console.log\('Registered routes on projects router:'\); list.forEach\(l => console.log\('  ' + l\)\);")
PowerShell(python --version; python -c "import docx; print\('python-docx available:', docx.__version__\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(try { $word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; Write-Host "Word COM available: Version $\($word.Version\)"; $word.Quit\(\) } catch { Write-Host "Word COM not available: $_" })

PowerShell($zip = "C:\\Users\\nitin.varshneya\\Downloads\\Github_Project\\acndev_GraphicAutonumber_1_0_0_1.zip"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $archive = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zip\); $archive.Entries | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; $archive.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($msapp = "C:\\Users\\nitin.varshneya\\Downloads\\Github_Project\\_extracted\\CanvasApps\\acndev_graphictrackerapp_a1b2c_DocumentUri.msapp"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; try { $archive = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($msapp\); $archive.Entries | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; $archive.Dispose\(\) } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; Write-Output "File may not be a valid zip/.msapp archive."; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($msapp\) | Select-Object -First 16; Write-Output \("First 16 bytes hex: " + \(\($bytes | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ }\) -join ' '\)\) })

PowerShell($msapp = "C:\\Users\\nitin.varshneya\\Downloads\\Github_Project\\GraphicAutonumber_Solution\\CanvasApps\\acndev_graphictrackerapp_a1b2c_DocumentUri.msapp"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $a = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($msapp\); $a.Entries | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { "{0,8}  {1}" -f $_.Length, $_.FullName }; $a.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\nitin.varshneya\\Downloads\\Github_Project" -Recurse -Depth 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match '\\.msapp$|\\.zip$|CanvasApp' } | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { MongoClient } = require\('mongodb'\); \(async \(\) => { const c = new MongoClient\(process.env.MONGODB_URI\); await c.connect\(\); const db = c.db\(process.env.MONGODB_DB || 'aadlc'\); const projects = await db.collection\('projects'\).find\({}\).toArray\(\); projects.forEach\(p => { console.log\('ID:', p._id.toString\(\)\); console.log\('  Name:', p.name\); console.log\('  Status:', p.status\); console.log\('  Dev Phase:', \(p.phases||[]\).find\(x => x.id==='dev'\)\); console.log\('  tddDocument.tasks.length:', p.tddDocument?.tasks?.length\); console.log\('  keyMetrics:', p.keyMetrics\); console.log\(''\); }\); await c.close\(\); }\)\(\);")
PowerShell(node -e "const p = require\('./project-dump.json'\); console.log\('=== SCREENS ==='\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.sddDocument.screens, null, 2\).slice\(0, 4000\)\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const p = require\('./project-dump.json'\); console.log\('=== USER FLOWS ==='\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.sddDocument.userFlows, null, 2\).slice\(0, 4000\)\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('=== COMPONENTS ==='\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.sddDocument.components, null, 2\).slice\(0, 3000\)\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const p = require\('./project-dump.json'\); const s = p.sddDocument; console.log\('=== REMAINING SCREENS ==='\); s.screens.slice\(2\).forEach\(scr => { console.log\('--', scr.id, ':', scr.name\); console.log\('   purpose:', scr.purpose\); console.log\('   validation:', JSON.stringify\(scr.validation\)\); }\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('=== TDD test strategy ==='\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.tddDocument.testStrategy, null, 2\).slice\(0, 2500\)\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('scripts:', JSON.stringify\(p.scripts, null, 2\)\); console.log\('devDeps nodemon:', p.devDependencies?.nodemon || 'not installed'\);")
PowerShell(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('proxy:', p.proxy || 'none'\); console.log\('main:', p.main\);")
